events.title: Sfax Water Protest Day 4
events.summary: Ongoing water supply cuts entering fourth day. Residents blockade municipality entrance. Security forces deployed to harbor area.

events.title: IMF Mission Departs Without Agreement
events.summary: IMF mission leaves Tunis without Q1 agreement. BCT FX reserves confirmed at 84 days import cover. Q3 deadline unchanged.

events.title: Journalist Detained Under Decree 54
events.summary: Investigative journalist arrested for publishing report on BCT reserve levels. Charged with spreading false information.

events.title: CPG Workers Blockade Metlaoui Mine
events.summary: Compagnie des Phosphates de Gafsa workers blockade Metlaoui mine entrance over 3 months unpaid wage arrears.

events.title: 3 Civil Activists Charged Decree 54
events.summary: Three civil society activists charged under Decree 54 for social media posts criticizing water management policy.

events.title: UGTT Strike Warning — Public Sector
events.summary: UGTT secretariat issues formal 72-hour strike warning covering public sector. General strike probability at 64%.

events.title: Kasserine Youth Protest — Unemployment
events.summary: Youth demonstration in Kasserine city center against unemployment. 200+ participants. One arrested. Police dispersal with teargas.

events.title: VPN Blocking Attempt — 48 Hours
events.summary: ATI implements VPN blocking attempt lasting 48 hours. Popular VPN services disrupted. Workarounds widely shared.

events.title: Sfax Water Supply Reduced to 6hrs/Day
events.summary: SONEDE confirms Sfax water supply reduced to 6 hours per day. Infrastructure failure cited. Opposition disputes explanation.

events.title: Parallel Market TND Premium Reaches 18%
events.summary: TND parallel market premium reaches 18% above official BCT rate. Capital flight indicator at warning level.

events.title: Gabes Chemical Pollution Protest
events.summary: 500+ residents protest ongoing industrial pollution from chemical complex. Ministry denies toxic levels. NGO data contradicts.

events.title: 4th Anniversary Presidential Power Grab
events.summary: Opposition marks July 25 with protests across Tunis. Regime celebrates. Security deployment heavy. 12 arrests reported.

events.title: STEG Power Cuts — Sidi Bouzid Protest
events.summary: STEG announces rolling power cuts in interior regions. Protest in Sidi Bouzid city center. 150 participants.

events.title: Ghannouchi Arrest — Day 1
events.summary: Rached Ghannouchi arrested on terrorism charges. Ennahda HQ raided. Mass international condemnation. Protests in Paris.

events.title: Mass Crossing Attempt — Sfax Coast
events.summary: 250+ migrants attempt Mediterranean crossing from El Amra departure zone. Coast Guard intercepts 180. 12 missing.
